---
name: Security Vulnerability
about: Report security issues privately (DO NOT disclose publicly)
labels: security
assignees: ''

body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        :warning: **Please DO NOT file public issues for security vulnerabilities.**

        For security issues, please email the maintainer directly instead.

        This template is for non-critical security-related topics only.
  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Description
      description: Describe the security concern.
